description: Isometric 3D-style conference and event maps with decorative zones, pathways, clouds, and stars — inspired by immersive event guide showcase boards

templates.name: Immersive Conference Map
templates.description: 3D isometric conference map with Speaker Showcase, Community Hub, Registration, Lightning Talks, and Agenda zones connected by yellow pathways

templates.name: Distributed Event World
templates.description: Multi-city or multi-venue event mapped as floating islands connected by bridges, each island hosting a different event track

templates.name: Hybrid Event Layout
templates.description: Split-world board showing physical venue on one side and virtual platform on the other, with bridges connecting shared experiences

templates.name: Festival Campus
templates.description: Multi-day festival campus with outdoor stages, workshop tents, food courts, sponsor villages, and winding pathways through the grounds
